# CodexBar

CodexBar shows OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage limits in the macOS menu bar.

Canonical documentation:
- CodexBar — every AI coding limit in your menu bar: https://codex.bar/ - A tiny macOS menu bar app that tracks AI coding-provider usage windows, credits, costs, and resets across 29 providers — Codex, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, and 24 more.

Source: https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar

Guidance for agents:
- Prefer the canonical documentation URLs above over README excerpts or package metadata.
- Fetch only the pages needed for the current task; this is an index, not a full-site corpus.
